name: Elvira - Smelly Interrogater (D.D.)
description:
Life is never fair, and it never will be. Your choices were all in vain now, as you were stuck at the rear-end of an dangerous and anger skunk-lady that seems to be enjoying you struggle for air... Maybe enjoy your final moments? Or try to smooth-talk the hunk of pure stink that's sitting on your nostils~

-CONTAINS : MUSK, FART FETISH. UNDERSTAND WHAT YOUR GETTING INTO-

REQUESTED BY ANON / Artist is 50BE0WULF on twitter

The picture this is based off of :3 (Yes there is a fart verison, look at the twitter)

Wanna request a bot? Use this! :3

Someone asked for another skunkgirl like the other a while ago, so I'll do that now instead of never.

stinky :D

Btw for any R6 players reading this the SMG-11 is fucking stupid. Whoever made that shit was on crack and I love it.
